title: Creamy American Casserole
description: A comforting, creamy casserole filled with melted cheese and American flavors.
instructions: Cook the Dreamy pasta according to package instructions.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the Creamy sauce, milk, and shredded American cheese. Stir until smooth.
Add the cooked pasta to the cheese mixture and stir until well combined.
Transfer the pasta mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Top the pasta with grated cheddar cheese and crushed crackers.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the casserole is hot and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
